# Agentic Consciousness

> AI consulting for Australian businesses. Strategy, implementation, automation. Founded by Daniel with 21+ years of industry experience.

## About

Agentic Consciousness is an AI consulting company that helps businesses understand, implement, and scale AI — from strategy workshops to full automation pipelines. Based in Australia, available nationally.

## Services

- [AI Strategy & Workshops](https://agenticconsciousness.com.au/#services): Custom sessions, opportunity mapping, practical roadmaps. From $3,000 AUD.
- [AI Tool Implementation](https://agenticconsciousness.com.au/#services): Deploy ChatGPT, Claude, Copilot, custom models into workflows. From $5,000 AUD.
- [Automation & Agents](https://agenticconsciousness.com.au/#services): End-to-end autonomous pipelines for document processing, customer service, scheduling. From $10,000 AUD.

## Pricing

- [Pricing](https://agenticconsciousness.com.au/pricing): Transparent pricing — three packages, no hidden fees, every engagement starts with a free consultation.

## Free Tools

- [AI Business Audit](https://agenticconsciousness.com.au/#ai-audit): Free AI readiness assessment for your business.
- [AI Tools Suite](https://agenticconsciousness.com.au/tools): Eight free AI-powered business tools — invoice scanner, quote generator, competitor analysis, email drafter, document summariser, meeting actions, job ads, contract review.

## FAQ

- [FAQ](https://agenticconsciousness.com.au/faq): Answers to common questions about AI consulting, services, pricing, and how we work.

## Blog

- [AI Automation for Small Business Australia 2026](https://agenticconsciousness.com.au/blog/ai-automation-small-business-australia-2026): Practical guide to AI tools Australian SMBs are using right now.
- [5 AI Automations for Trades Businesses](https://agenticconsciousness.com.au/blog/ai-automations-australian-trades-business-2026): Quoting, scheduling, invoicing, reviews, and inventory automation for tradies.
- [ChatGPT vs Claude vs Copilot](https://agenticconsciousness.com.au/blog/chatgpt-vs-claude-vs-copilot-business): Honest comparison of the three major AI assistants for business.
- [AI Customer Service Guide](https://agenticconsciousness.com.au/blog/ai-customer-service-without-losing-human-touch): How to use AI chatbots and email triage without alienating customers.
- [AI Document Processing for Finance](https://agenticconsciousness.com.au/blog/ai-document-processing-guide-australian-finance-teams): Invoice extraction, receipt scanning, compliance checks for Australian finance teams.
- [AI Readiness Audit Guide](https://agenticconsciousness.com.au/blog/ai-readiness-audit-guide): What an AI readiness audit covers and why it matters.
- [Building Your First AI Workflow](https://agenticconsciousness.com.au/blog/building-your-first-ai-workflow-step-by-step-guide): Step-by-step guide from choosing a process to measuring results.
- [The Real Cost of NOT Using AI](https://agenticconsciousness.com.au/blog/real-cost-of-not-using-ai-in-your-business): Calculating the opportunity cost of manual processes.
- [RSS Feed](https://agenticconsciousness.com.au/feed.xml): Subscribe to new posts.

## Contact

- Website: https://agenticconsciousness.com.au
- Email: ai@agenticconsciousness.com.au
- Location: Australia (nationally available)

## Process

1. Free discovery call — 30 minutes, no obligation
2. AI readiness audit — assess your systems, data, and team
3. Implementation sprint — build and deploy in weeks, not months
4. Optimise and scale — iterate based on real results
